detailedDescription: The MSI B550 Gaming Plus motherboard features the AMD B550 chipset with AM4 socket support. This ATX form factor board supports up to 128GB of DDR4 RAM across 4 slots. Equipped with PCIe 4.0 expansion slots, 2 M.2 slots, and 6 SATA ports for extensive storage options. Connectivity includes USB 3.2 Gen 2 ports and is ideal for mainstream users looking for balanced performance and value.
additionalSpecs: AM4 | AMD B550 Chipset | ATX | 4x DDR4 Slots (Max 128GB) | 2x M.2 Slots | 6x SATA Ports | USB 3.2 Gen 2
